import subprocess
import shlex
from flask import Flask, request

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/ping")
def ping_host():
    hostname = request.args.get("host", "localhost")
    result = subprocess.run(
        f"ping -c 1 {hostname}",
        shell=True,
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
    )
    return {"output": result.stdout, "returncode": result.returncode}

@app.route("/search")
def search_files():
    pattern = request.args.get("q", "")
    result = subprocess.run(
        f"grep -r '{pattern}' /data/",
        shell=True,
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
    )
    return {"matches": result.stdout}

def run_user_script(user_input: str):
    cmd = f"python /scripts/{user_input}.py"
    proc = subprocess.Popen(cmd, shell=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE)
    stdout, _ = proc.communicate()
    return stdout.decode()
